name: Asthalin / Ventolin
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Short-acting beta-2 adrenoceptor agonist (SABA) that relaxes bronchial smooth muscle by stimulating beta-2 receptors, causing rapid bronchodilation.
food_interactions: Caffeine can worsen tachycardia and tremor
what_to_avoid: Do not use more than prescribed — overuse indicates poor asthma control
Rinse mouth after use (if using high dose)
storage: Store below 30°C, away from heat and direct sunlight
